caption: The video captures a scene of a person standing at a podium, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal or semi-formal event. The speaker is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate designs and a red necklace, suggesting a cultural or traditional significance. They are wearing glasses and have their hair tied back. The audience, seated in front of the speaker, is attentively listening, with some individuals turning their heads slightly towards the speaker. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, adding a warm and intimate atmosphere to the setting. A guitar is visible on the right side of the frame, hinting that music might be part of the event. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or venue hosting the event. The overall mood seems to be one of engagement and respect as the speaker delivers their message.
